name: dc-hub-nexus
description: Data center intelligence platform with 10,400+ facilities, M&A deal tracking, capacity pipeline, and infrastructure mapping worldwide

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search data center facilities by location, operator, or capacity. Returns facility details including name, coordinates, power capacity, and provider.

query.description: Search query - city, state, country, or operator name

tools.name: get_market_stats
tools.description: Get global data center market statistics including total facilities, capacity, top operators, and geographic distribution.

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get latest data center industry news from 60+ sources including announcements, expansions, and deals.

tools.name: get_deals
tools.description: Get M&A deals and transactions in the data center industry with buyer, seller, and deal value.

tools.name: get_capacity_pipeline
tools.description: Get announced data center capacity expansions and new builds with MW estimates.

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Analyze infrastructure around a location for data center suitability - power substations, fiber routes, water availability.
